transcript.content: We appreciate the opportunity to discuss supply of electronic components.
Our BATNA is $13,000 from domestic suppliers so we need competitive pricing.
Thank you for considering us. Building a long-term relationship is our priority.
We would like to propose 500 units at $120 per unit with our standard quality expectations.
We can accept $130 per unit given current material costs. 500 units with quality guarantee.
We accept. This establishes our partnership.
